summary: Comprehensive testing of POS updates iteration 4 - all features working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified - POS per-item price mode, TransferPage, Shop order lookup.
passed_tests: GET /api/warehouses - returns warehouses with main warehouse (总部仓库) ✓
GET /api/transfer-logs - returns transfer history with product_id, from/to warehouse, quantity ✓
POST /api/inventory/transfer - successfully transfers stock between warehouses ✓
GET /api/shop/order-lookup - returns orders with product details (product_name, quantity, unit_price) ✓
MRG001 pricing - price1=$15, price2=$13, price3=$12 verified ✓
Admin /admin/transfers - TransferPage loads with form and inventory overview ✓
Admin /admin/transfers - sidebar link '调货管理' visible and clickable ✓
POS /pos - each cart item has per-item price mode buttons (价格1/价格2/整箱) ✓
POS /pos - clicking 价格2 button changes item price to price2 ✓
POS /pos - clicking 整箱 button shows box price with calculation (X箱×price3 + Y件×price2) ✓
POS /pos - Bs. toggle in header converts all prices to Bolivares ✓
POS /pos - Cart badge shows 'USD' or 'Bs.' based on toggle ✓
POS /pos - Total correctly sums items with different price modes ✓
Shop /shop/orders - order lookup shows product name, code, quantity, unit_price ✓

features_verified.pos_per_item_price_mode: Working - Each cart item has 价格1/价格2/整箱 toggle buttons
features_verified.box_calculation: Working - Shows 'X箱×price3 + Y件×price2' when box_quantity>1 and 整箱 selected
features_verified.bs_toggle: Working - USD/Bs. toggle converts all displayed prices
features_verified.transfer_page: Working - /admin/transfers with form (source/dest warehouse, product, qty) and inventory overview table
features_verified.inventory_transfer: Working - POST /api/inventory/transfer moves stock between warehouses
features_verified.shop_order_lookup: Working - Returns order with items including product_name, product_code, quantity, unit_price

seed_data_creation: Test order ON2026031301245418A9 with phone 04121234567 exists. MRG001 product with multi-price setup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All POS update features tested and working: (1) Per-item price mode in cart - each item can switch between 价格1/价格2/整箱 independently, (2) Box calculation shows 'X箱×price3 + Y件×price2' when applicable, (3) TransferPage at /admin/transfers allows warehouse-to-warehouse stock transfer with logs, (4) Shop order lookup shows product details. Exchange rate is ~40.5 usd_to_ves. Warehouses: 总部仓库 (main), 测试仓库.
